Published

March 31, 2026

Load packages & ggplot theme 
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(psych)
library(parameters)
library(correlation)
library(papaja)
library(ggdist)
library(fastDummies)
library(ggcorrplot)

source("../Scripts/plot_settings.R")
source("../Scripts/helper_functions.R")
Load data 
# Load external variables
ext_food      <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_foods.csv") 
ext_countries <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_countries.csv") 
ext_mammals   <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_mammals.csv") 

# Load MDS cues
mds_food      <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_food.csv")      |> add_column(ID = 1:80)
mds_countries <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_countries.csv") |> add_column(ID = 1:80)
mds_mammals   <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_mammals.csv")   |> add_column(ID = 1:80)


# Merge ext and mds
ext_food      <- ext_food      |> left_join(mds_food,by="ID") 
ext_countries <- ext_countries |> left_join(mds_countries,by="ID") 
ext_mammals   <- ext_mammals   |> left_join(mds_mammals,by="ID")

External variables

Plot correlations 
temp_ext_food <- ext_food |>
                    dummy_cols(select_columns          = "category",
                               remove_first_dummy      = FALSE,   # keep all categories
                               remove_selected_columns = FALSE) |>
                    select(-category) |> 
                    mutate(cat_fruit_veg = category_Fruits + category_Vegetables) |> 
                    select(g_carbohydrates_per100g:g_fat_per100g,contains("cat"),V1:V14) |> 
                    rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_food <- temp_ext_food |>
                    correlation() |>
                    summary() %>%
                    .[1:14,c(1,15:2)] |> 
                    as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p1 <- corr_ext_food |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Food")

p1

ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_food.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
Plot correlations 
temp_ext_countries <- ext_countries |>
                        dummy_cols(select_columns          = "continent",
                                   remove_first_dummy      = FALSE,   # keep all categories
                                   remove_selected_columns = FALSE) |>
                        select(-continent) |>  
                        select(latitude:HDI,contains("continent"),V1:V10) |> 
                        rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_countries <- temp_ext_countries |>
                        correlation() |>
                        summary() %>%
                        .[1:16,c(1,11:2)] |> 
                        as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p2 <- corr_ext_countries |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Countries")

p2 

ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_countries.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
Plot correlations 
temp_ext_mammals <- ext_mammals |>
                      select(-category) |> 
                      mutate(has_fur = ifelse(has_fur == "Yes",1,0),
                             has_tail = ifelse(has_tail == "Yes",1,0),
                             has_legs = ifelse(has_legs == "Yes",1,0)) |> 
                      select(female_maturity_days:main_color,V1:V10) |> 
                      rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_mammals <- temp_ext_mammals |>
                    correlation(include_factors = TRUE) |>
                    summary() %>%
                    .[c(1:26),c(1,15:2)] |> 
                    as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p3 <- corr_ext_mammals |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Mammals")

p2


ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_mammals.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
Source Code
---
title: "Supplement"
subtitle: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "David Izydorczyk"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-copy: true
    code-tools: true
    df-print: kable
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    fig-height: 4
    fig-width:  9
    fig-cap-location: top
    tab-cap-location: top
    embed-resources: true
    grid:
      margin-width: 350px
execute:
  warning: false
  messages: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
#| code-summary: "Load packages & ggplot theme"
#| cache: false

# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(psych)
library(parameters)
library(correlation)
library(papaja)
library(ggdist)
library(fastDummies)
library(ggcorrplot)

source("../Scripts/plot_settings.R")
source("../Scripts/helper_functions.R")
```

```{r data}
#| code-summary: "Load data"

# Load external variables
ext_food      <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_foods.csv") 
ext_countries <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_countries.csv") 
ext_mammals   <- read_csv2("../Materials/external_vars_mammals.csv") 

# Load MDS cues
mds_food      <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_food.csv")      |> add_column(ID = 1:80)
mds_countries <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_countries.csv") |> add_column(ID = 1:80)
mds_mammals   <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_mammals.csv")   |> add_column(ID = 1:80)


# Merge ext and mds
ext_food      <- ext_food      |> left_join(mds_food,by="ID") 
ext_countries <- ext_countries |> left_join(mds_countries,by="ID") 
ext_mammals   <- ext_mammals   |> left_join(mds_mammals,by="ID")
```

## External variables

```{r}
#| code-summary: "Plot correlations"
#| label: fig-corrFood
#| fig-cap: "Correlations of MDS with external variables (Food)"
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width:  15
#| column: page


temp_ext_food <- ext_food |>
                    dummy_cols(select_columns          = "category",
                               remove_first_dummy      = FALSE,   # keep all categories
                               remove_selected_columns = FALSE) |>
                    select(-category) |> 
                    mutate(cat_fruit_veg = category_Fruits + category_Vegetables) |> 
                    select(g_carbohydrates_per100g:g_fat_per100g,contains("cat"),V1:V14) |> 
                    rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_food <- temp_ext_food |>
                    correlation() |>
                    summary() %>%
                    .[1:14,c(1,15:2)] |> 
                    as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p1 <- corr_ext_food |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Food")

p1

ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_food.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
```

```{r}
#| code-summary: "Plot correlations"
#| label: fig-corrCountries
#| fig-cap: "Correlations of MDS with external variables (Countries)"
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width:  15
#| column: page


temp_ext_countries <- ext_countries |>
                        dummy_cols(select_columns          = "continent",
                                   remove_first_dummy      = FALSE,   # keep all categories
                                   remove_selected_columns = FALSE) |>
                        select(-continent) |>  
                        select(latitude:HDI,contains("continent"),V1:V10) |> 
                        rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_countries <- temp_ext_countries |>
                        correlation() |>
                        summary() %>%
                        .[1:16,c(1,11:2)] |> 
                        as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p2 <- corr_ext_countries |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Countries")

p2 

ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_countries.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
```

```{r}
#| code-summary: "Plot correlations"
#| label: fig-corrMammals
#| fig-cap: "Correlations of MDS with external variables (Mammals)"
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width:  15
#| column: page


temp_ext_mammals <- ext_mammals |>
                      select(-category) |> 
                      mutate(has_fur = ifelse(has_fur == "Yes",1,0),
                             has_tail = ifelse(has_tail == "Yes",1,0),
                             has_legs = ifelse(has_legs == "Yes",1,0)) |> 
                      select(female_maturity_days:main_color,V1:V10) |> 
                      rename_with(~ paste0("dim_", seq_along(.x)), matches("^V\\d+$"))  

corr_ext_mammals <- temp_ext_mammals |>
                    correlation(include_factors = TRUE) |>
                    summary() %>%
                    .[c(1:26),c(1,15:2)] |> 
                    as.data.frame()

# Melt data to long format
p3 <- corr_ext_mammals |> 
    pivot_longer(cols      = starts_with("dim_"),
                 names_to  = "Dimension",
                 values_to = "Correlation") |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = Dimension, y = Parameter, fill = abs(Correlation))) +
      geom_tile(colour = "white")  +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#00335B") +
      coord_equal() +
      theme_nice() + 
      geom_text(aes(label=papaja::printnum(abs(Correlation),
                                           gt1 = FALSE)), color="black") +
      theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
            legend.position = "right",
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
      labs(fill = "Abs(r)",x = "", y = "",
           title = "Correlations: Mammals")

p2


ggsave("../Figures/S_corr_mammals.pdf", width = 50 , height = 20 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
```

```{r}
#| include: false

p1+p2+p3 + plot_layout(widths = c(14/14, 10/14, 10/14))
ggsave("../Figures/S_corrs.pdf", width = 70 , height = 25 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)

```
